revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-5-120

1 The process by which a cell or battery delivers current to an external circuit. A discharge may be continuous or intermittent.

2 The quantity of electricity that is removed from a cell or battery while current is delivered to an external circuit.

It is usually measured in ampere-hours.

{{IALAFooter}}
